name: Butter Pecan Chocolate Marshmallow Bars
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: bjs
Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Mix cake mix, margarine and water until blended.
Firm into greased 9x13 inch pan. Bake for 15-18 minutes.
Layer marshmallows, chocolate chips, and coconut over crust.
Bake for an additional 2-3 minutes or until marshmallows begin to melt.
Cool completely before cutting into bars. Makes 24 pieces.
